summary: Production Activation Layer (Iteration 70) - Comprehensive testing of P0/P1/P2 features. All 21 backend API tests passed. Frontend dashboard fixed and all 5 tabs functional. Fixed import path issue (../../components vs ../components) and API endpoint double-prefix issue (/api/api -> /api).
seed_data_creation: None - uses existing production data and computed values
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production Activation Layer fully tested. All P0 features (Redis health, RBAC middleware, reliability pipeline, God Router decomposition) working. P1 features (voucher pipeline, notification delivery, production readiness) working. P2 features (frontend dashboard, secrets management, supplier integrations) working. Dashboard at /app/admin/production-activation. Fixed two frontend bugs: (1) import paths in ProductionActivationPage.jsx changed from ../components/ui to ../../components/ui, (2) API endpoints changed from /api/production/... to /production/... because axios baseURL already includes /api.

mocked_services.Resend_email: MOCKED - no RESEND_API_KEY configured, gracefully degrades to skipped status
mocked_services.Slack_webhook: MOCKED - no webhook URL configured, gracefully degrades to skipped status

features_verified.P2_Frontend_dashboard: PASS - All 5 tabs (Readiness, Pipeline, Tasks, Suppliers, Secrets) working
